Cable installation requires minimum bending radius of 20x outer diameter and maximum pulling tension of 50 N/mm2. ^[7d66d85bd5f00d45:doc:1]

## Methods

Installation methods include duct pulling, direct burial, and trenchless techniques. ^[7d66d85bd5f00d45:doc:1]

## Jointing

All joints must be installed in a controlled environment with prefabricated joints preferred. ^[7d66d85bd5f00d45:doc:1]
